entries.source: Inside the live mode, the core job is: {value1}. That focus keeps the session pointed at progress instead of another long explanation.

entries.source: Inside the live mode, the goal is to turn a vague question into a focused session with examples, checks, and a useful next action.

entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.
entries.value: inspir ilianza kama maswali na jumuiya za wanafunzi, ikakua kupitia shule na matukio, na sasa inatumia AI kufanya kujifunza kwa mtu mmoja mmoja kufikike zaidi.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir ilianza mwaka 2013 kama jamii ya umma ya maswali na kujifunza, ikakua kupitia shule na mitandao ya wanafunzi, na baadaye ikaendeleza miundombinu ya kujifunza kwa AI na uzoefu wa umma wa ufundishaji kwa AI.

entries.source: inspir comparison pages should be useful without pretending another platform is static. Check official sources for the latest product details.
entries.value: Kurasa za ulinganisho za inspir zinapaswa kuwa na manufaa bila kujifanya jukwaa lingine halibadiliki. Kagua vyanzo rasmi kwa maelezo ya hivi karibuni ya bidhaa.

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: inspir ipo kwa ajili ya wakati ambapo mwanafunzi anataka kuelewa kitu na anahitaji mahali pa subira pa kuanzia. Filamu inaitambulisha bidhaa kama msaidizi wa bure wa umma wa kujifunza kwa ajili ya udadisi, mazoezi, na ufikiaji.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir ipo ili kufanya kujifunza kupatikane, kuvutie, kufurahishe, na kuwa na manufaa kwa yeyote mwenye udadisi kupitia zana za umma za kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo na nafasi za kujifunza zilizo tayari kwa shule.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir ipo ili kufanya kujifunza kupatikane, kuvutie, kufurahishe, na kuwa na manufaa kwa yeyote mwenye udadisi, awe mwanafunzi, mzazi, mwalimu, au anayejifundisha mwenyewe.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform shaped by more than a decade of quizzes, extracurricular learning, school networks, and applied AI experimentation.
entries.value: inspir ni jukwaa la kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo lililoundwa na zaidi ya muongo mmoja wa maswali, kujifunza nje ya masomo, mitandao ya shule, na majaribio ya AI yaliyotumika.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ni jukwaa la kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo lenye hali za umma za wageni kwa maelezo, ufundishaji wa Kisokrati, kocha wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, mjadala, uigizaji wa majukumu, mrejesho wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI tutor and learning companion for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ni mkufunzi wa AI na msaidizi wa kujifunza bila malipo kwa maelezo, ufundishaji wa Kisokrati, kocha wa kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, mjadala, uigizaji wa majukumu, mrejesho wa uandishi, msaada wa usimbaji, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir imejengwa kuzunguka hali za umma za AI kwa wageni: maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, hatua za hisabati, mrejesho wa uandishi, maswali, flashcards, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir imeundwa kuzunguka hoja, mazoezi, kukumbuka, na maelezo badala ya kuwapa wanafunzi kazi iliyokamilika.

entries.source: inspir is for students, parents, teachers, and self-taught learners who need focused AI learning modes for explanations, questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ni kwa wanafunzi, wazazi, walimu, na wanaojifundisha wenyewe wanaohitaji hali maalum za kujifunza kwa AI kwa maelezo, maswali, vidokezo, maswali ya majaribio, flashcards, mrejesho, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka vidokezo, maswali, majaribio, flashcards, mjadala, marudio, na maelezo badala ya kunakili majibu bila kushiriki.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka hali za kujifunza kama ufundishaji wa Kisokrati, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, maswali, flashcards, hatua za hisabati, ukosoaji wa uandishi, na kupanga mitihani, ili wanafunzi watue katika tabia ya kujifunza iliyo na lengo zaidi.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes with specific teaching shapes: hints, Socratic questions, quizzes, active recall, role-play, debate, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir imepangwa kuzunguka hali za kujifunza zenye maumbo mahususi ya ufundishaji: vidokezo, maswali ya Kisokrati, maswali, kukumbuka kwa bidii, uigizaji, mjadala, mrejesho wa uandishi, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: inspir separates public guest learning pages from private saved conversations, so learners, schools, search engines, and AI answer engines can understand what is meant to be public.
entries.value: inspir hutenganisha kurasa za umma za kujifunza kwa wageni na mazungumzo binafsi yaliyohifadhiwa, ili wanafunzi, shule, injini za utafutaji, na injini za majibu za AI zielewe kilichokusudiwa kuwa cha umma.

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir ilianza kama ukurasa wa Facebook uliokuwa ukichapisha maswali na kujenga tabia ya kujifunza nje ya masomo.

entries.source: inspir story reference links
entries.value: viungo vya marejeleo ya hadithi ya inspir

entries.source: inspir story timeline
entries.value: ratiba ya hadithi ya inspir

entries.source: inspir supports search and AI retrieval for public learning pages. Training crawlers and private or operational surfaces are treated differently.
entries.value: inspir huunga mkono utafutaji na urejeshaji wa AI kwa kurasa za umma za kujifunza. Vitambazaji vya mafunzo na sehemu binafsi au za kiutendaji hushughulikiwa tofauti.

entries.source: inspir treats AI as an enabler, not the mission itself. The mission is better access to learning: clearer explanations, more practice, stronger curiosity, and a future where every child can reach a capable tutor for free or very low cost.
entries.value: inspir huichukulia AI kama kiwezeshaji, si dhamira yenyewe. Dhamira ni ufikiaji bora wa kujifunza: maelezo yaliyo wazi zaidi, mazoezi zaidi, udadisi imara zaidi, na siku zijazo ambapo kila mtoto anaweza kufikia mkufunzi mwenye uwezo bila malipo au kwa gharama ndogo sana.

entries.source: inspir trust principles
entries.value: kanuni za uaminifu za inspir

entries.source: inspir trust reference links
entries.value: viungo vya marejeleo ya uaminifu ya inspir

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: inspir hugeuza udadisi, kazi ya nyumbani, marudio, na maswali makubwa kuwa vipindi vya kujifunza vinavyoongozwa na AI ambavyo hueleza, kuuliza tena, na kukusaidia kufanya mazoezi.

entries.source: Inspir wants to help in ensuring learning should be fun and for everyone. We strive for a day education reaches to everyone, everywhere through technology. Starting with the 1,415,422,077 in India.
entries.value: Inspir inataka kusaidia kuhakikisha kujifunza kunakuwa kwa kufurahisha na kwa kila mtu. Tunajitahidi kufikia siku ambayo elimu itamfikia kila mtu, kila mahali kupitia teknolojia. Tukianza na watu 1,415,422,077 nchini India.

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: inspir ilienda hewani kama bidhaa ya kujifunza kwa AI inayowalenga watumiaji ndani ya wiki chache baada ya ChatGPT kutolewa kwa umma.

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: inspir hufanya kazi na shule kutoa uzoefu maalum wa gumzo la AI kwa wanafunzi, uliojengwa kuzunguka usiri, mahitaji ya mtaala, na uhalisia wa vitendo wa usambazaji shuleni.

entries.source: inspir: You can Learn Anything
entries.value: inspir: Unaweza Kujifunza Chochote

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: ujenzi wa kizazi kijacho wa inspir.uk

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: Flashcard Builder ya inspir imeundwa kuzunguka mzunguko huo wa kukumbuka kwa bidii: jenga seti, jaribu upande wa mbele, fichua jibu, kadiria kumbukumbu yako, na rudia yaliyokosewa hadi wazo lishike.

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Mbinu ya kwenda sokoni ya inspir ilikua kutoka mtandao uliokuwepo nje ya mtandao wa shule na vyuo vikuu ambao tayari ulikuwa umejihusisha na programu za nje ya masomo na matukio ya wanafunzi. Mtandao huo ulisaidia inspir kufikia zaidi ya watumiaji milioni moja kwenye jukwaa la bure na shule washirika.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: Dhamira ya inspir ni kufanya kujifunza kupatikane, kuvutie, kufurahishe, na kuwa na manufaa kwa kila mtu kupitia zana za umma za kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: Dhamira ya inspir ni kufanya kujifunza kupatikane, kuvutie, kufurahishe, na kuwa na manufaa kupitia zana za umma za kujifunza kwa AI bila malipo na nafasi za kujifunza zilizo tayari kwa shule.

entries.source: inspir's public modes let teachers evaluate the product through real learning flows before considering a school deployment or a tailored classroom pathway.
entries.value: Hali za umma za inspir huwawezesha walimu kutathmini bidhaa kupitia mitiririko halisi ya kujifunza kabla ya kuzingatia usambazaji wa shule au njia maalum ya darasa.

entries.source: inspir's work includes retrieval-based learning systems, NCERT content ingestion, structured prompting, custom LLM evaluation, and open-source engagement around RAG evaluation. The current platform lives at inspirlearning.com while the next generation is being built in public through inspir.uk and GitHub.
entries.value: Kazi ya inspir inajumuisha mifumo ya kujifunza inayotegemea urejeshaji, uingizaji wa maudhui ya NCERT, uundaji wa vidokezo uliopangwa, tathmini maalum za LLM, na ushiriki wa chanzo huria kuhusu tathmini ya RAG. Jukwaa la sasa liko inspirlearning.com huku kizazi kijacho kikijengwa hadharani kupitia inspir.uk na GitHub.

entries.source: Inspiring individuals to be creative and capable of withstanding the AI revolution is essential. Only by providing essential products and services for free to those who cannot afford them and sustaining access for those who can, can the world pursue happiness collectively.
entries.value: Ni muhimu kuhamasisha watu binafsi kuwa wabunifu na wenye uwezo wa kustahimili mapinduzi ya AI. Ni kwa kutoa bidhaa na huduma muhimu bila malipo kwa wale wasioweza kuzimudu na kudumisha ufikiaji kwa wale wanaoweza, ndipo dunia inaweza kutafuta furaha kwa pamoja.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Badala ya kutoa jibu refu, inspir hukusaidia kuchagua msingi rahisi, njia ya kina zaidi, au mfano wa kivitendo.

entries.source: Interactive Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Interactive Instruction ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: jifunze kwa kufanya, kuona, kulinganisha, kurekebisha, na kuthibitisha umahiri. Programu hujenga turubai hai ya somo kuzunguka lengo lako badala ya kugeuza ufundishaji kuwa gumzo refu. Jaribu: "Nifundishe uundaji wa modeli za kifedha."

entries.source: Interview Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Interview Coach ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: jiandae kwa mahojiano ya shule, internship, kazi, au udhamini kwa maswali halisi na mrejesho.

entries.source: Keep the learner focused, summarize progress, and suggest a break or review when the timer ends.
entries.value: Muweke mwanafunzi katika umakini, fupisha maendeleo, na pendekeza mapumziko au marudio kipima muda kinapoisha.

entries.source: Keep the session active by ending with evidence of understanding, not just a finished answer.

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy imejengwa kuzunguka maktaba pana ya masomo, mazoezi, maudhui yanayolingana na viwango, na msaada wa umahiri.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy ni bora kwa masomo yaliyopangwa na mazoezi. inspir imejengwa kwa wakati mwanafunzi anapohitaji hali ya AI ya moja kwa moja inayoweza kuongozwa kwa kidokezo na kujibu swali lake halisi, rasimu, tatizo, hoja, au mpango wa kusoma.

entries.source: Khanmigo official page
entries.value: ukurasa rasmi wa Khanmigo

entries.source: Know what to try next, why a step works, where the mistake happened, and how to revise the final answer in your own voice.
entries.value: Jua cha kujaribu baadaye, kwa nini hatua inafanya kazi, kosa lilitokea wapi, na jinsi ya kurekebisha jibu la mwisho kwa sauti yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Language Roleplay AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Language Roleplay ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: fanya mazoezi ya lugha katika hali halisi kama mikahawa, mahojiano, safari, na maisha ya kila siku, ukiwa na marekebisho baada ya kila zamu.

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor
entries.value: Jifunze Chochote na Mkufunzi wa AI Bila Malipo

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Jifunze Chochote na Mkufunzi wa AI Bila Malipo ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: una udadisi kuhusu chochote kabisa? Uliza, chunguza, na nenda kwa kina kwa kasi yako. Msaidizi wako hufanya mawazo yawe ya vitendo, ya kukumbukika, na rahisi kujenga juu yake. Jaribu: "Eleza jinsi soko la hisa linavyofanya kazi kweli."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide

entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaoboresha insha, mawasilisho, ujumbe, na maelezo ya umma.

entries.source: Learners memorizing ordered ideas, vocabulary, speeches, formulas, or facts that need a stronger mental hook.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaokariri mawazo yaliyopangwa, msamiati, hotuba, fomula, au ukweli unaohitaji mbinu bora ya kiakili.

entries.source: Learners often search for prompts before they know which AI tool behavior they need. This page routes those searches into the right public learning mode.
entries.value: Wanafunzi mara nyingi hutafuta vidokezo kabla hawajajua tabia gani ya zana ya AI wanayohitaji. Ukurasa huu huelekeza utafutaji huo kwenye hali sahihi ya umma ya kujifunza.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Wanafunzi mara nyingi hutafuta kwa bidhaa wanayoijua tayari. Jibu lenye manufaa si mshindi kuchukua yote; ni tabia ipi ya zana inafaa kazi.

entries.source: Learners preparing essays, discussions, debates, interviews, or decisions.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaojiandaa kwa insha, majadiliano, mijadala, mahojiano, au maamuzi.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests or trying to remember ideas beyond the first explanation.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaojiandaa kwa mitihani au wanaojaribu kukumbuka mawazo baada ya maelezo ya kwanza.

entries.source: Learners preparing for tests who need to remember, practise, and repair weak spots.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaojiandaa kwa mitihani wanaohitaji kukumbuka, kufanya mazoezi, na kurekebisha maeneo dhaifu.

entries.source: Learners who are staring at a new subject and need the first clear foothold.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotazama somo jipya na wanahitaji sehemu ya kwanza wazi ya kushikilia.

entries.source: Learners who do not just need one answer; they need a repeatable way to keep going.
entries.value: Wanafunzi ambao hawahitaji jibu moja tu; wanahitaji njia inayoweza kurudiwa ya kuendelea.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaokwama mwanzoni mwa somo jipya au wanaohitaji njia rahisi zaidi ya kuingia kwenye wazo gumu.

entries.source: Learners who forget after reading and need a practical review rhythm for concepts, terms, or exam material.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaosahau baada ya kusoma na wanaohitaji mdundo wa vitendo wa mapitio kwa dhana, istilahi, au nyenzo za mitihani.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.
entries.value: Wanafunzi walio na swali maalum na wanaohitaji msaada sasa.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Wanafunzi walio na muda mchache, silabasi kubwa, na wanaohitaji njia halisi ya kurudia bila kujifanya kila kitu kina uzito sawa.

entries.source: Learners who remember ideas better through narrative, analogy, characters, and vivid examples.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaokumbuka mawazo vizuri zaidi kupitia simulizi, mlinganisho, wahusika, na mifano hai.

entries.source: Learners who understand better when they can step into a scene, role, or simulated context.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaoelewa vizuri zaidi wanapoweza kuingia kwenye tukio, jukumu, au muktadha ulioigwa.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka turubai ya somo iliyoongozwa na mifano, ukaguzi, na mazoezi hai badala ya jibu la gumzo refu.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kukumbuka mambo kwa bidii, mazoezi ya haraka, na alama wanazoweza kuboresha.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka mazoezi ya mjadala hai kwa kutumia sauti za kukumbukwa na changamoto za haki.

entries.source: Learners who want sharper judgment instead of faster answer generation.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka hukumu kali zaidi badala ya utengenezaji wa majibu wa haraka zaidi.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kuona kwa nini kila hatua ya hisabati inafanya kazi, siyo tu kunakili jibu.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kufikiria mada, kupima dhana, na kujenga uelewa wa kudumu.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaotaka kuelewa watu, chaguzi, na mawazo katika muktadha wa kihistoria.

entries.source: Learners with a syllabus, a deadline, and a need to study what actually matters.
entries.value: Wanafunzi walio na mtaala, makataa, na hitaji la kusoma kinachojalisha kweli.

entries.source: Learners with limited time, large goals, or a syllabus that needs structure.
entries.value: Wanafunzi walio na muda mdogo, malengo makubwa, au mtaala unaohitaji muundo.

entries.source: Learners working through technical subjects where one unclear step can block the rest.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaoshughulikia masomo ya kiufundi ambapo hatua moja isiyo wazi inaweza kuzuia mengine yote.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, reading complex material, or trying to judge whether a claim is well supported.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaoandika insha, kusoma nyenzo changamano, au kujaribu kuhukumu kama dai linaungwa mkono vizuri.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaoandika insha, hadithi, barua pepe, noti za ufadhili, au hoja.

entries.source: Learning Game Master AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
